next_steps: Collect stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Perform electromyography and nerve conduction studies with repetitive nerve stimulation
Initiate Botulism Immune Globulin (BabyBIG) administration immediately
Test serum for botulinum toxin and inflammatory markers
Repeat neurologic examination focused on cranial nerve function and autonomic stability
Perform extensive environmental exposure history inquiry (honey, dust, soil)
Administer Botulism Immune Globulin (BabyBIG) immediately without waiting for lab confirmation
Collect stool sample for C. botulinum toxin and culture
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation and electromyography (looking for incremental response)
Consult pediatric neurology and ophthalmology for assessment of bulbar function and fixed pupils
Obtain serum for botulinum toxin assay and comprehensive metabolic/toxicology panels
Conduct detailed environmental exposure investigation (honey, soil, dust, vacuum contents)
Monitor for complications including ileus and autonomic instability
